21 #include <arcane/SharedVariable.h>

23 using namespace Arcane;

28  class EuclidianGeometryT;

32  template<Integer Dimension, typename CoordinatesVariable>
33  struct IComputeLineT {
34  IComputeLineT(EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : m_geom(geom), m_coords(geom->m_coords) { }
35  virtual ~IComputeLineT() { }
36  virtual void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center) = 0;
37  EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * m_geom;
38  const CoordinatesVariable & m_coords;
39  };
40 
41  template<Integer Dimension, typename CoordinatesVariable>
42  struct ComputeLine2T { };
43 
44  template<typename CoordinatesVariable>
45  struct ComputeLine2T<2, CoordinatesVariable> : public IComputeLineT<2, CoordinatesVariable> {
46  ComputeLine2T(EuclidianGeometryT<2, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : IComputeLineT<2, CoordinatesVariable>(geom) { }
47  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center);
48  };
49 
50  template<typename CoordinatesVariable>
51  struct ComputeLine2T<3, CoordinatesVariable> : public IComputeLineT<3, CoordinatesVariable> {
52  ComputeLine2T(EuclidianGeometryT<3, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : IComputeLineT<3, CoordinatesVariable>(geom) { }
53  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center);
54  };

61  struct IComputeSurfaceT {
62  IComputeSurfaceT(EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : m_geom(geom), m_coords(geom->m_coords) { }
63  virtual ~IComputeSurfaceT() { }
64  virtual void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords) = 0;
65  EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * m_geom;
66  const CoordinatesVariable & m_coords;
67  };
68

70  struct ComputeTriangle3T : public IComputeSurfaceT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> {
71  ComputeTriangle3T(EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : IComputeSurfaceT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable>(geom) { }
72  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);
73  };
74

78  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);
79  };

82  struct ComputePentagon5T : public IComputeSurfaceT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> {

84  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);

88  struct ComputeHexagon6T : public IComputeSurfaceT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> {

90  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);
91  };

103  };

110  template<Integer Dimension, typename CoordinatesVariable>
111  struct IComputeVolumeT {
112  IComputeVolumeT(EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : m_geom(geom), m_coords(geom->m_coords) { }
113  virtual ~IComputeVolumeT() { }
114  virtual void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & measure, Real3 & center, Array<Real> & coords) = 0;
115  virtual void computeVolumeArea(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & area) = 0;
116  EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * m_geom;
117  const CoordinatesVariable & m_coords;
118  };
119

121  struct ComputeTetraedron4T : public IComputeVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> {

123  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & measure, Real3 & center, Array<Real> & coords);
124  void computeVolumeArea(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & area);
125  };

173  struct ComputeGenericVolumeT : public IComputeVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> {
174  ComputeGenericVolumeT(EuclidianGeometryT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> * geom) : IComputeVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable>(geom) { }

179  /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
180  /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
181 
182  template<Integer Dimension, typename CoordinatesVariable>
183  class EuclidianGeometryT : public IGeometry
184  {
185  public:
187  typedef ComputeLine2T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeLine2;
188  typedef ComputeTriangle3T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeTriangle3;
189  typedef ComputeQuad4T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeQuad4;
190  typedef ComputePentagon5T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputePentagon5;
191  typedef ComputeHexagon6T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHexagon6;
192  typedef ComputeTetraedron4T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeTetraedron4;
193  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHeptaedron10;
194  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeOctaedron12;
195  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputePyramid5;
196  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputePentaedron6;
197  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHexaedron8;
198  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHemiHexa7;
199  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHemiHexa6;
200  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHemiHexa5;
201  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeAntiWedgeLeft6;
202  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeAntiWedgeRight6;
203  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeDiTetra5;
204 #if ARCANE_VERSION > 12201 || (ARCANE_VERSION==12201 && ARCANE_VERSION_BETA > 0)
205  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeEnneedron14;
206  typedef ComputeGenericVolumeT<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeDecaedron16;
207  typedef ComputeHeptagon7T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeHeptagon7;
208  typedef ComputeOctogon8T<Dimension, CoordinatesVariable> ComputeOctogon8;
209 #endif
211 
212  public:
213  EuclidianGeometryT(const CoordinatesVariable & coords,
214  ITraceMng * traceMng = NULL,
215  bool fatal_on_error = false,
216  Integer normal_2d_id = 0 );
217 
218  virtual ~EuclidianGeometryT() { }
219 
221 
223  Real3 computeCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item);
224 
225  Real3 computeCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Array<Real> & coords);
226 
227 
229 
235  Real3 computeOrientedMeasure(const ItemWithNodes & item);
236 
238  Real computeMeasure(const ItemWithNodes & item);
239 
241 
242  Real computeLength(const ItemWithNodes & item);
243 
245 
246  Real computeArea(const ItemWithNodes & item);
247 
249 
250  Real computeVolume(const ItemWithNodes & item);
251 
252  // REMOVED FROM IGEOMETRY : CHECK USAGE
253  // //! Calcul du centre
254  // Real3 computeSurfaceCenter(Integer n, const Real3 * coords);
255 
257  Real3 computeOrientedArea(Integer n, const Real3 * coords)
258  {
259  Real3 normal(0.,0.,0.);
260  for(Integer i=1;i<n-1;++i)
261  normal += computeTriangleNormal(coords[0],coords[i],coords[i+1]);
262  return normal;
263  }
264 
266  Real computeLength(const Real3& m, const Real3& n)
267  {
268  const Real3 d = m-n ;
269  return math::sqrt(math::scaMul(d,d)) ;
270  }
271 
272 
274 
276  static inline Real3 computeTriangleNormal(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2)
277  {
278  return Arcane::math::vecMul(n1-n0,n2-n0) / 2.0;
279  }
280 
281  static inline Real computeTriangleSurface(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2)
282  {
283  return Arcane::math::normeR3(computeTriangleNormal(n0,n1,n2));
284  }
285 
286  static inline Real3 computeTriangleCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2)
287  {
288  return (n0+n1+n2) / 3.0;
289  }
290 
291  static inline Real computeTetraedronVolume(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3)
292  {
293  return Arcane::math::mixteMul(n1-n0,n2-n0,n3-n0) / 6.0;
294  }
295 
296  static inline Real3 computeTetraedronCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3)
297  {
298  return 0.25 * (n0+n1+n2+n3);
299  }
300 
301  static inline Real3 computeQuadrilateralCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3)
302  {
303  Real s0 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n2);
304  Real s1 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n2,n3);
305  Real s2 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n2,n3);
306  Real s3 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n3);
307  Real totalS = (s0+s1+s2+s3);
308 
309  if(totalS == 0)
310  {
311  s0=1; s1=1; s2=1; s3=1;
312  totalS = (s0+s1+s2+s3);
313  }
314 
315 
316  return (s0 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n2) +
317  s1 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n2,n3) +
318  s2 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n2,n3) +
319  s3 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n3)) / totalS;
320  }
321 
322  static inline Real3 computeQuadrilateralCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3,
323  Real & s0, Real & s1, Real & s2, Real & s3, Real & totalS)
324  {
325  s0 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n2);
326  s1 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n2,n3);
327  s2 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n2,n3);
328  s3 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n3);
329  totalS = (s0+s1+s2+s3);
330 
331  if(totalS == 0)
332  {
333  s0=1; s1=1; s2=1; s3=1;
334  totalS = (s0+s1+s2+s3);
335  }
336 
337 
338  return (s0 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n2) +
339  s1 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n2,n3) +
340  s2 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n2,n3) +
341  s3 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n3)) / totalS;
342  }
343 
344  static inline Real3 computePentagonalCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3, const Real3 & n4)
345  {
346  Real s0 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n0,n1);
347  Real s1 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n2);
348  Real s2 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n2,n3);
349  Real s3 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n3,n4);
350  Real s4 = computeTriangleSurface(n3,n4,n0);
351  Real s5 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n2,n3);
352  Real s6 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n3,n4);
353  Real s7 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n4,n0);
354  Real s8 = computeTriangleSurface(n3,n0,n1);
355  Real s9 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n1,n2);
356  Real totalS = (2*(s0+s1+s2+s3+s4) + s5 + s6 + s7 + s8 + s9);
357 
358  if (totalS == 0.)
359  {
360  s0=1; s1=1; s2=1;
361  s3=1; s4=1; s5=1;
362  s6=1; s7=1; s8=1; s9=1;
363  totalS=(2*(s0+s1+s2+s3+s4) + s5 + s6 + s7 + s8 + s9);
364  }
365 
366  return (2*(s0 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n0,n1) +
367  s1 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n2) +
368  s2 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n2,n3) +
369  s3 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n3,n4) +
370  s4 * computeTriangleCenter(n3,n4,n0)) +
371  s5 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n2,n3) +
372  s6 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n3,n4) +
373  s7 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n4,n0) +
374  s8 * computeTriangleCenter(n3,n0,n1) +
375  s9 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n1,n2)) / totalS;
376  }
377 
378  static inline Real3 computeHexagonalCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3, const Real3 & n4, const Real3 & n5)
379  {
380  Real s0 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n5);
381  Real s1 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n2,n3);
382  Real s2 = computeTriangleSurface(n3,n4,n5);
383  Real s3 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n3,n5);
384  Real s4 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n2);
385  Real s5 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n3,n4);
386  Real s6 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n5,n0);
387  Real s7 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n2,n4);
388  Real totalS = (s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7);
389 
390  if (totalS == 0.)
391  {
392  s0=1; s1=1; s2=1;
393  s3=1; s4=1; s5=1;
394  s6=1; s7=1;
395  totalS = (s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7);
396  }
397 
398  return (s0 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n5) +
399  s1 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n2,n3) +
400  s2 * computeTriangleCenter(n3,n4,n5) +
401  s3 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n3,n5) +
402  s4 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n2) +
403  s5 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n3,n4) +
404  s6 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n5,n0) +
405  s7 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n2,n4)) / totalS;
406  }
407 
408  static inline Real3 computeHeptagonalCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3, const Real3 & n4, const Real3 & n5, const Real3 & n6)
409  {
410  Real s0 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n2);
411  Real s1 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n2,n3);
412  Real s2 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n3,n4);
413  Real s3 = computeTriangleSurface(n3,n4,n5);
414  Real s4 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n5,n6);
415  Real s5 = computeTriangleSurface(n5,n6,n0);
416  Real s6 = computeTriangleSurface(n6,n0,n1);
417  Real s7 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n2,n4);
418  Real s8 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n3,n5);
419  Real s9 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n4,n6);
420  Real s10 = computeTriangleSurface(n3,n5,n0);
421  Real s11 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n6,n1);
422  Real s12 = computeTriangleSurface(n5,n0,n2);
423  Real s13 = computeTriangleSurface(n6,n1,n3);
424  Real totalS = (s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7 + s8 + s9 + s10 + s11 + s12 + s13);
425 
426  if (totalS == 0.)
427  {
428  s0=1; s1=1; s2=1;
429  s3=1; s4=1; s5=1;
430  s6=1; s7=1; s8=1;
431  s9=1; s10=1; s11=1;
432  s12=1; s13=1;
433  totalS = (s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7 + s8 + s9 + s10 + s11 + s12 + s13);
434  }
435 
436  return (
437  s0 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n2) +
438  s1 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n2,n3) +
439  s2 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n3,n4) +
440  s3 * computeTriangleCenter(n3,n4,n5) +
441  s4 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n5,n6) +
442  s5 * computeTriangleCenter(n5,n6,n0) +
443  s6 * computeTriangleCenter(n6,n0,n1) +
444  s7 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n2,n4) +
445  s8 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n3,n5) +
446  s9 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n4,n6) +
447  s10 * computeTriangleCenter(n3,n5,n0) +
448  s11 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n6,n1) +
449  s12 * computeTriangleCenter(n5,n0,n2) +
450  s13 * computeTriangleCenter(n6,n1,n3)) / totalS;
451 
452  }
453 
454  static inline Real3 computeOctogonalCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3, const Real3 & n4, const Real3 & n5, const Real3 & n6, const Real3 & n7)
455  {
456  Real s0 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n1,n2);
457  Real s1 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n3,n4);
458  Real s2 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n5,n6);
459  Real s3 = computeTriangleSurface(n6,n7,n0);
460  Real s4 = computeTriangleSurface(n0,n2,n4);
461  Real s5 = computeTriangleSurface(n2,n4,n6);
462  Real s6 = computeTriangleSurface(n4,n6,n0);
463  Real s7 = computeTriangleSurface(n1,n3,n5);
464  Real s8 = computeTriangleSurface(n3,n5,n7);
465  Real s9 = computeTriangleSurface(n5,n7,n1);
466  Real totalS = (s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7 + s8 + s9);
467 
468  if (totalS == 0.)
469  {
470  s0=1; s1=1; s2=1;
471  s3=1; s4=1; s5=1;
472  s6=1; s7=1; s8=1;
473  s9=1;
474  totalS = (s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7 + s8 + s9);
475  }
476 
477  return (
478  s0 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n1,n2) +
479  s1 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n3,n4) +
480  s2 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n5,n6) +
481  s3 * computeTriangleCenter(n6,n7,n0) +
482  s4 * computeTriangleCenter(n0,n2,n4) +
483  s5 * computeTriangleCenter(n2,n4,n6) +
484  s6 * computeTriangleCenter(n4,n6,n0) +
485  s7 * computeTriangleCenter(n1,n3,n5) +
486  s8 * computeTriangleCenter(n3,n5,n7) +
487  s9 * computeTriangleCenter(n5,n7,n1)) / totalS;
488  }
489 
490  public:
491  const CoordinatesVariable & m_coords;
492  ITraceMng * m_trace_mng;
493  bool m_fatal_on_error;
494  Integer m_2d_normal_id ;
495  };
496 
497  // Implementation and typedefs
498 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/Euclidian/EuclidianGeometryT.h"
499 
500  typedef EuclidianGeometryT<2, VariableNodeReal3> EuclidianGeometry2;
501  typedef EuclidianGeometryT<3, VariableNodeReal3> EuclidianGeometry3;
502 
503  typedef EuclidianGeometryT<2, SharedMeshVariableScalarRefT<Node,Real3> > SharedEuclidianGeometry2;
504  typedef EuclidianGeometryT<3, SharedMeshVariableScalarRefT<Node,Real3> > SharedEuclidianGeometry3;
505 }
506 
507 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_MESH_GEOMETRY_EUCLIDIANGEOMETRY_EUCLIDIANGEOMETRY_H */
